# Talend TMC API Reference

Auto-generated catalog of every MCP tool exposed by this server. Each tool maps
one-to-one to an OpenAPI operation in the upstream Talend Cloud spec.

**Reference catalog for all 20 Talend Cloud APIs** (version `2021-03` unless overridden). Note this catalogs the full API surface for reference; the server is observability-scoped by default, exposing the `observability` preset's 8 tools plus the `tmc_list_environments` meta-tool. Widen the surface with an explicit `TMC_APIS` list.

See [../setup-wizard.md](../setup-wizard.md) to install credentials, and
[../usage-examples.md](../usage-examples.md) for common workflows.

## Index

| API | Slug | Tools | Summary |
| --- | --- | ---: | --- |
| [Orchestration](./orchestration.md) | `orchestration` | 90 | Manage your Artifacts, Tasks, Plans, Schedules, Environments, Workspaces, Promotions and all associated Ressources |
| [Processing](./processing.md) | `processing` | 64 | Configure Engines and Clusters, manage and browse executions of your Tasks, Plans and Promotions. |
| [Identities Management](./identities-management.md) | `identities-management` | 28 | Manage identity data related to users, groups and roles from your Talend Cloud account. |
| [SCIM v2](./scim-v2.md) | `scim-v2` | 26 | Manage your users and groups using SCIM 2.0. |
| [Workspace Permissions](./workspace-permissions.md) | `workspace-permissions` | 16 | Control and manage your users detailed permissions upon Workspaces and Engines. |
| [Dataset](./dataset.md) | `dataset` | 15 | Manage the datasources referenced in Talend Cloud applications and the configuration and metadata associated to these datasources (attributes, data types, data quality). |
| [Crawler](./crawler.md) | `crawler` | 12 | A crawler allows you to retrieve a full list of assets contained in a connection, in a single operation. Manage crawlers to retrieve data at a large scale and enrich your inventory more efficiently. |
| [Ip Allowlist](./ip-allowlist.md) | `ip-allowlist` | 11 | Create and alter client IP allowlists, to restrict the access to Talend Cloud to only trusted IP addresses. |
| [Dynamic Engine](./dynamic-engine.md) | `dynamic-engine` | 11 | Manage Dynamic Engines |
| [Sharing](./sharing.md) | `sharing` | 9 | Manage how your users and groups can access your Talend Cloud entities. |
| [Service Accounts](./service-accounts.md) | `service-accounts` | 7 | Manage service accounts and their permissions. |
| [Dynamic Engine Environments](./dynamic-engine-environments.md) | `dynamic-engine-environments` | 7 | Manage and assign your Environments to Dynamic Engines.  |
| [SSO Role Mapping](./sso-role-mapping.md) | `sso-role-mapping` | 5 | Create and alter the role mappings, to assign automatically Talend roles to your SSO users. |
| [Execution Logs](./execution-logs.md) | `execution-logs` | 4 | Retrieve logs about task runs.  |
| [Connections](./connections.md) | `connections` | 3 | Manage the connections used by the datasets. |
| [Observability Metrics](./observability-metrics.md) | `observability-metrics` | 2 | Retrieve execution metrics |
| [Execution History Search](./execution-history-search.md) | `execution-history-search` | 2 | Retrive execution history by filtering on the fields such as time period, workspaces while exluding plan execution tasks. |
| [Audit Logs](./audit-logs.md) | `audit-logs` | 1 | Load your account's audit logs for monitoring activities on Talend Cloud applications, ensuring data security and managing regulatory compliance risks. |
| [OAuth](./oauth.md) | `oauth` | 1 | With service accounts, you are enabled to use the OAuth2 Client Credentials Flow for accessing Talend Cloud APIs. |
| [Seats and Subscription](./seats-and-subscription.md) | `seats-and-subscription` | 1 | Retrieve information details on your subscription and its usage accross Talend Apps.  |

## How tool names are formed

`<api_slug>__<operationId>` where:
- `api_slug` has hyphens replaced with underscores (e.g. `dynamic-engine` → `dynamic_engine`)
- `operationId` is taken straight from the OpenAPI spec, sanitized to `[A-Za-z0-9_]`
- Names longer than 64 characters are truncated; duplicates get `_2`, `_3`, … suffixes

See [../architecture.md](../architecture.md) for the full mapping rules.
